  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "**Green-Ampt Infiltration Model**\n",
        "\n",
        "Infiltration rate:\n",
        "$$f(t) = K_s \\left(1 + \\frac{\\psi \\cdot \\Delta\\Theta}{F(t)}\\right)$$\n",
        "\n",
        "Cumulative infiltration (implicit):\n",
        "$$F(t) = K_s t + \\psi \\cdot \\Delta\\Theta \\ln\\left(1 + \\frac{F(t)}{\\psi \\cdot \\Delta\\Theta}\\right)$$\n",
        "\n",
        "where $\\Delta\\Theta = \\theta_s - \\theta_i$"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "BNVCX4M2lPcX"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "!pip install ipywidgets --quiet\n",
        "\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec\n",
        "from ipywidgets import interact, FloatSlider, Dropdown, Output\n",
        "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
        "from IPython.display import display, clear_output\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Soil presets (Rawls et al.) ──────────────────────────────\n",
        "PRESETS = {\n",
        "    \"Sand\":       dict(Ks=117.8, psi=49.5,  ths=0.437, thi=0.020),\n",
        "    \"Loamy sand\": dict(Ks=29.9,  psi=61.3,  ths=0.437, thi=0.036),\n",
        "    \"Sandy loam\": dict(Ks=10.9,  psi=110.1, ths=0.453, thi=0.041),\n",
        "    \"Loam\":       dict(Ks=3.4,   psi=88.9,  ths=0.463, thi=0.052),\n",
        "    \"Silt loam\":  dict(Ks=6.5,   psi=166.8, ths=0.501, thi=0.030),\n",
        "    \"Clay loam\":  dict(Ks=1.0,   psi=208.8, ths=0.464, thi=0.063),\n",
        "    \"Clay\":       dict(Ks=0.3,   psi=316.3, ths=0.475, thi=0.068),\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Green-Ampt solver ────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "def solve_green_ampt(Ks, psi, dtheta, duration_hr, N=300):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Solves F(t) implicitly via Newton iteration, then derives f(t).\n",
        "\n",
        "    Governing equation:\n",
        "        F(t) = Ks*t + psi*dtheta * ln(1 + F(t)/(psi*dtheta))\n",
        "\n",
        "    Infiltration rate:\n",
        "        f(t) = Ks * (1 + psi*dtheta / F(t))\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    dt = duration_hr / N\n",
        "    times = np.linspace(0, duration_hr, N + 1)\n",
        "    F = np.zeros(N + 1)\n",
        "    f = np.zeros(N + 1)\n",
        "\n",
        "    f[0] = Ks * (1 + psi * dtheta / 1e-9)   # near-infinite at t=0\n",
        "\n",
        "    for i in range(1, N + 1):\n",
        "        F_prev = F[i - 1]\n",
        "        # Newton-Raphson to solve implicit equation\n",
        "        F_new = F_prev + Ks * dt              # initial guess\n",
        "        for _ in range(50):\n",
        "            lhs = F_new\n",
        "            rhs = (F_prev + Ks * dt +\n",
        "                   psi * dtheta * np.log((F_new + psi * dtheta) /\n",
        "                                         (F_prev + psi * dtheta)))\n",
        "            F_new = rhs\n",
        "            if abs(F_new - lhs) < 1e-8:\n",
        "                break\n",
        "        F[i] = F_new\n",
        "        f[i] = Ks * (1 + psi * dtheta / F_new)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return times, F, f\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Plot function ────────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "def run_simulation(preset, Ks, psi, ths, thi, rainfall, duration):\n",
        "    dtheta = max(0.001, ths - thi)\n",
        "    times, F, f = solve_green_ampt(Ks, psi, dtheta, duration)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Cap infiltration rate at rainfall intensity (ponding)\n",
        "    f_actual = np.minimum(f, rainfall)\n",
        "    rain_cum  = rainfall * times\n",
        "    runoff    = np.maximum(0, rain_cum - F)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Find ponding time\n",
        "    ponding_time = None\n",
        "    for i, fi in enumerate(f):\n",
        "        if fi <= rainfall:\n",
        "            ponding_time = times[i]\n",
        "            break\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ── Metrics ──\n",
        "    total_inf    = F[-1]\n",
        "    total_rain   = rainfall * duration\n",
        "    total_runoff = max(0, total_rain - total_inf)\n",
        "    final_rate   = f_actual[-1]\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ── Figure ──────────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "    fig = plt.figure(figsize=(14, 9))\n",
        "    fig.patch.set_facecolor('#f8f9fa')\n",
        "    gs = gridspec.GridSpec(2, 3, figure=fig, hspace=0.45, wspace=0.35)\n",
        "\n",
        "    BLUE   = '#378ADD'\n",
        "    GREEN  = '#1D9E75'\n",
        "    ORANGE = '#D85A30'\n",
        "    GRAY   = '#888780'\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ── Panel 1: Infiltration rate ───────────────────────────\n",
        "    ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, :2])\n",
        "    ax1.fill_between(times, f_actual, alpha=0.15, color=GREEN)\n",
        "    ax1.plot(times, f_actual, color=GREEN, lw=2, label='Infiltration rate f(t)')\n",
        "    ax1.axhline(rainfall, color=BLUE, lw=1.5, ls='--', label=f'Rainfall intensity i = {rainfall:.0f} mm/hr')\n",
        "    if ponding_time:\n",
        "        ax1.axvline(ponding_time, color=ORANGE, lw=1.2, ls=':', alpha=0.8,\n",
        "                    label=f'Ponding at t = {ponding_time:.2f} hr')\n",
        "    ax1.set_xlabel('Time (hr)', color=GRAY, fontsize=10)\n",
        "    ax1.set_ylabel('mm / hr', color=GRAY, fontsize=10)\n",
        "    ax1.set_title('Infiltration rate', fontsize=12, fontweight='normal', color='#2C2C2A')\n",
        "    ax1.legend(fontsize=9, framealpha=0.5)\n",
        "    ax1.set_facecolor('#ffffff')\n",
        "    ax1.tick_params(colors=GRAY)\n",
        "    ax1.spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "    ax1.spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ── Panel 2: Soil texture schematic ─────────────────────\n",
        "    ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 2])\n",
        "    ax2.set_facecolor('#ffffff')\n",
        "    ax2.set_xlim(0, 1); ax2.set_ylim(0, 1)\n",
        "    ax2.axis('off')\n",
        "    ax2.set_title('Soil moisture profile', fontsize=12, fontweight='normal', color='#2C2C2A')\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Draw soil column with moisture gradient\n",
        "    n_layers = 20\n",
        "    wf_depth = min(0.9, F[-1] / max(F[-1], 1) * 0.85 + 0.05)\n",
        "    for j in range(n_layers):\n",
        "        depth_frac = j / n_layers\n",
        "        if depth_frac < wf_depth:\n",
        "            color = plt.cm.Blues(0.3 + 0.5 * (1 - depth_frac / wf_depth))\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            color = plt.cm.YlOrBr(0.2 + 0.3 * thi / max(ths, 0.001))\n",
        "        rect = plt.Rectangle((0.2, 1 - (j+1)/n_layers), 0.6, 1/n_layers,\n",
        "                               facecolor=color, edgecolor='#cccccc', lw=0.3)\n",
        "        ax2.add_patch(rect)\n",
        "\n",
        "    ax2.annotate('', xy=(0.5, 1 - wf_depth), xytext=(0.5, 1 - wf_depth - 0.08),\n",
        "                 arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color=ORANGE, lw=1.5))\n",
        "    ax2.text(0.5, 1 - wf_depth - 0.13, 'Wetting front', ha='center',\n",
        "             fontsize=8, color=ORANGE)\n",
        "    ax2.text(0.5, 1.02, 'Surface', ha='center', fontsize=8, color=GRAY)\n",
        "    ax2.text(0.15, 0.92, f'θ = θs\\n{ths:.3f}', ha='center', fontsize=7.5, color='#0C447C')\n",
        "    ax2.text(0.15, 0.35, f'θ = θi\\n{thi:.3f}', ha='center', fontsize=7.5, color='#5F5E5A')\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ── Panel 3: Cumulative ──────────────────────────────────\n",
        "    ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])\n",
        "    ax3.fill_between(times, F, alpha=0.15, color=GREEN)\n",
        "    ax3.plot(times, F, color=GREEN, lw=2, label='Cumulative F(t)')\n",
        "    ax3.plot(times, rain_cum, color=BLUE, lw=1.5, ls='--', label='Cumulative rainfall')\n",
        "    ax3.fill_between(times, F, rain_cum, where=(rain_cum > F), alpha=0.12,\n",
        "                     color=ORANGE, label='Runoff zone')\n",
        "    ax3.set_xlabel('Time (hr)', color=GRAY, fontsize=10)\n",
        "    ax3.set_ylabel('mm', color=GRAY, fontsize=10)\n",
        "    ax3.set_title('Cumulative infiltration', fontsize=12, fontweight='normal', color='#2C2C2A')\n",
        "    ax3.legend(fontsize=8, framealpha=0.5)\n",
        "    ax3.set_facecolor('#ffffff')\n",
        "    ax3.tick_params(colors=GRAY)\n",
        "    ax3.spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "    ax3.spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ── Panel 4: Runoff ──────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "    ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])\n",
        "    ax4.fill_between(times, runoff, alpha=0.15, color=ORANGE)\n",
        "    ax4.plot(times, runoff, color=ORANGE, lw=2, label='Cumulative runoff')\n",
        "    ax4.set_xlabel('Time (hr)', color=GRAY, fontsize=10)\n",
        "    ax4.set_ylabel('mm', color=GRAY, fontsize=10)\n",
        "    ax4.set_title('Surface runoff', fontsize=12, fontweight='normal', color='#2C2C2A')\n",
        "    ax4.legend(fontsize=8, framealpha=0.5)\n",
        "    ax4.set_facecolor('#ffffff')\n",
        "    ax4.tick_params(colors=GRAY)\n",
        "    ax4.spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "    ax4.spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ── Panel 5: Summary metrics ─────────────────────────────\n",
        "    ax5 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 2])\n",
        "    ax5.set_facecolor('#ffffff')\n",
        "    ax5.axis('off')\n",
        "    ax5.set_title('Summary', fontsize=12, fontweight='normal', color='#2C2C2A')\n",
        "\n",
        "    metrics = [\n",
        "        ('Final infil. rate',  f'{final_rate:.2f} mm/hr'),\n",
        "        ('Total infiltration',  f'{total_inf:.1f} mm'),\n",
        "        ('Total rainfall',      f'{total_rain:.1f} mm'),\n",
        "        ('Total runoff',        f'{total_runoff:.1f} mm'),\n",
        "        ('Runoff ratio',        f'{100*total_runoff/max(total_rain,0.001):.1f} %'),\n",
        "        ('Ponding time',        f'{ponding_time:.3f} hr' if ponding_time else 'None'),\n",
        "        ('Ks',                  f'{Ks:.1f} mm/hr'),\n",
        "        ('ψ (suction)',         f'{psi:.1f} mm'),\n",
        "        ('ΔΘ (moisture def.)', f'{dtheta:.3f}'),\n",
        "    ]\n",
        "    for k, (label, val) in enumerate(metrics):\n",
        "        y = 0.92 - k * 0.10\n",
        "        ax5.text(0.05, y, label, fontsize=9, color=GRAY, va='top')\n",
        "        ax5.text(0.98, y, val,   fontsize=9, color='#2C2C2A', va='top',\n",
        "                 ha='right', fontweight='normal')\n",
        "        ax5.axhline(y - 0.025, xmin=0.03, xmax=0.97, color='#e0e0e0', lw=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig.suptitle(f'Green-Ampt infiltration  —  {preset}',\n",
        "                 fontsize=14, fontweight='normal', color='#2C2C2A', y=1.01)\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Widgets ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "style  = {'description_width': '160px'}\n",
        "layout = widgets.Layout(width='480px')\n",
        "\n",
        "w_preset   = Dropdown(options=list(PRESETS.keys()), value='Sandy loam',\n",
        "                       description='Soil type preset:', style=style, layout=layout)\n",
        "w_Ks       = FloatSlider(min=0.1,  max=120,  step=0.1,  value=10.9,  description='Ks (mm/hr):',       style=style, layout=layout, readout_format='.1f')\n",
        "w_psi      = FloatSlider(min=10,   max=400,  step=1,    value=110.1, description='ψ suction (mm):',   style=style, layout=layout, readout_format='.1f')\n",
        "w_ths      = FloatSlider(min=0.30, max=0.60, step=0.001,value=0.453, description='θs porosity:',      style=style, layout=layout, readout_format='.3f')\n",
        "w_thi      = FloatSlider(min=0.01, max=0.55, step=0.001,value=0.041, description='θi initial moist.:', style=style, layout=layout, readout_format='.3f')\n",
        "w_rainfall = FloatSlider(min=5,    max=200,  step=1,    value=50,    description='Rainfall (mm/hr):', style=style, layout=layout, readout_format='.0f')\n",
        "w_duration = FloatSlider(min=0.5,  max=24,   step=0.5,  value=6,     description='Duration (hr):',    style=style, layout=layout, readout_format='.1f')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Auto-fill sliders when preset changes\n",
        "def on_preset_change(change):\n",
        "    p = PRESETS[change['new']]\n",
        "    w_Ks.value  = p['Ks']\n",
        "    w_psi.value = p['psi']\n",
        "    w_ths.value = p['ths']\n",
        "    w_thi.value = p['thi']\n",
        "\n",
        "w_preset.observe(on_preset_change, names='value')\n",
        "\n",
        "out = Output()\n",
        "\n",
        "def on_change(_):\n",
        "    with out:\n",
        "        clear_output(wait=True)\n",
        "        run_simulation(\n",
        "            w_preset.value,\n",
        "            w_Ks.value, w_psi.value,\n",
        "            w_ths.value, w_thi.value,\n",
        "            w_rainfall.value, w_duration.value\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "for w in [w_preset, w_Ks, w_psi, w_ths, w_thi, w_rainfall, w_duration]:\n",
        "    w.observe(on_change, names='value')\n",
        "\n",
        "display(widgets.VBox([\n",
        "    widgets.HTML(\"<h3 style='margin:0 0 8px;font-weight:500'>Green-Ampt infiltration simulator</h3>\"),\n",
        "    w_preset, w_Ks, w_psi, w_ths, w_thi, w_rainfall, w_duration,\n",
        "    out\n",
        "]))\n",
        "\n",
        "on_change(None)   # draw initial plot\n",
        "from ipywidgets import interact, FloatSlider\n",
        "\n",
        "def update_soil_analysis(ec_value, na_value, cec_value):\n",
        "    # Calculations\n",
        "    if cec_value > 0:\n",
        "        esp_val = (na_value / cec_value) * 100\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        esp_val = 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Soil Classification Logic\n",
        "    if ec_value > 4 and esp_val < 15:\n",
        "        soil_class = \"Saline \"\n",
        "    elif ec_value < 4 and esp_val > 15:\n",
        "        soil_class = \"Sodic \"\n",
        "    elif ec_value > 4 and esp_val > 15:\n",
        "        soil_class = \"Saline-Sodic \"\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        soil_class = \"Normal \"\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Output Display\n",
        "    print(\"-\" * 40)\n",
        "    print(f\"{'Soil Chemical Analysis':^40}\")\n",
        "    print(\"-\" * 40)\n",
        "    print(f\"{'Soil Class:':<25} {soil_class:>15}\")\n",
        "    print(f\"{'ESP (%):':<25} {esp_val:>12.2f}%\")\n",
        "    print(f\"{'EC (dS/m):':<25} {ec_value:>13}\")\n",
        "    print(\"-\" * 40)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Interactive Widgets\n",
        "interact(update_soil_analysis,\n",
        "         ec_value=FloatSlider(min=0.1, max=15.0, step=0.1, value=5.2, description='EC (dS/m):'),\n",
        "         na_value=FloatSlider(min=1.0, max=60.0, step=0.5, value=18.0, description='Na (meq/100g):'),\n",
        "         cec_value=FloatSlider(min=10.0, max=120.0, step=1.0, value=25.0, description='CEC:'))\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "%matplotlib inline\n",
        "\n",
        "def draw_textured_triangle(sand, clay):\n",
        "    silt = 100 - (sand + clay)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if clay >= 40: res = \"Clay\"\n",
        "    elif clay >= 27: res = \"Clay Loam\"\n",
        "    elif sand >= 70: res = \"Sandy\"\n",
        "    else: res = \"Loam\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 7))\n",
        "\n",
        "    ticks = np.arange(0, 110, 10)\n",
        "    for t in ticks:\n",
        "        # (Sand gridlines - diagonal towards silt)\n",
        "        ax.plot([t, t/2], [0, t*np.sin(np.pi/3)], color='gray', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.5)\n",
        "        # (Clay gridlines - horizontal)\n",
        "        ax.plot([t/2, 100-t/2], [t*np.sin(np.pi/3), t*np.sin(np.pi/3)], color='gray', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.5)\n",
        "        # (Silt gridlines - diagonal towards sand)\n",
        "        ax.plot([t, 50+t/2], [0, (100-t)*np.sin(np.pi/3)], color='gray', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if t > 0 and t < 100:\n",
        "            ax.text(t, -4, str(100-t), ha='center', fontsize=8, color='blue')\n",
        "            ax.text(t/2 - 2, t*np.sin(np.pi/3), str(t), va='center', ha='right', fontsize=8, color='red')\n",
        "            ax.text(100-t/2 + 2, t*np.sin(np.pi/3), str(100-t), va='center', ha='left', fontsize=8, color='green')\n",
        "\n",
        "    points = np.array([[0, 0], [100, 0], [50, 86.6], [0, 0]])\n",
        "    ax.plot(points[:, 0], points[:, 1], color='black', lw=2)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # x = silt + 0.5 * clay\n",
        "    px = (100 - sand) - (clay / 2)\n",
        "    py = clay * 0.866\n",
        "\n",
        "    ax.scatter(px, py, color='red', s=250, zorder=10, edgecolors='black')\n",
        "    ax.text(px, py + 5, f\"{res}\\n(Sa:{sand}%, Cl:{clay}%)\",\n",
        "            color='red', fontweight='bold', ha='center', zorder=11, fontsize=12)\n",
        "\n",
        "    ax.text(-15, -7, 'SAND 100%', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='blue')\n",
        "    ax.text(85, -7, 'SILT 100%', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='green')\n",
        "    ax.text(45, 95, 'CLAY 100%', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='red')\n",
        "\n",
        "    ax.set_title(\"Soil Texture Result with Grid\", fontsize=16, pad=20)\n",
        "    ax.axis('off')\n",
        "    ax.set_xlim(-20, 120)\n",
        "    ax.set_ylim(-15, 110)\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "draw_textured_triangle(sand=60, clay=15)"
      ],
